findings.line: Better paper than the road deserved.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: the urgency and roughness of the dispatch run
findings.reason: The sentence launders judgment onto the road instead of naming the dispatch conditions that make the vellum excessive.
findings.suggestedFix: Better paper than a road dispatch usually got.

findings.line: "Then home had better learn to ride farther."
findings.subject: home
findings.realAgent: the people and institutions trying to keep the threat bounded by the old border
findings.reason: An abstraction is given cognition and adaptation instead of naming the people who would have to follow the threat farther north.

findings.line: The road narrowed into the kind of track merchants still used because trade had made it, not because any lord cared to keep it easy.
findings.subject: trade
findings.realAgent: the merchants and cart traffic that wore the track into use
findings.reason: The abstraction 'trade' is treated as the builder of the road instead of the repeated human traffic that shaped it.
findings.suggestedFix: The road narrowed into the kind of track merchants still used because merchants had worn it in, not because any lord cared to keep it easy.

findings.line: Behind them Stratholme kept its place in the sky as long as the dark allowed.
findings.subject: Stratholme
findings.realAgent: the visible smoke stain lingering above the city
findings.reason: The city is carrying the visual persistence instead of the concrete stain of smoke that remains visible in the sky.
findings.suggestedFix: Behind them Stratholme's stain stayed in the sky as long as the dark allowed.

findings.line: That landed. Vereesa flinched in the eyes only.
findings.reason: This is the weakest generic eye-routed reaction in a chapter that already spends five eye/gaze beats; it is the cleanest excess instance to cut.
findings.suggestedFix: That landed. Vereesa flinched, just once.
